message:
Refine update-cli and add install tracking

update-cli.ts:
- Integrated with config for update check recording
- Added shouldOutputJson for consistent JSON output detection
- Cleaned up unused skipVerify option
- --force now reinstalls even when up-to-date

InstallSkillButton.tsx:
- Added analytics tracking for skill_install events
- Tracks both single and bulk install actions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
